doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: Section 8 of the EEOC Compliance Manual is dedicated to "Retaliation," not age discrimination, and the text includes modern phrasing not found in official agency documentation.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The official EEOC Compliance Manual Section 8 covers "Retaliation," not Age Discrimination, and the text uses modern terminology (social-platform usage) not present in actual EEOC manual revisions.
